# Hand-built adversarial / gray-zone samples for the flow classifier.
# Format: <label>\t<input>
# label is CMD or NL. Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
# These are the cases that matter most: ambiguous first words, NL embedded in
# real commands, Chinese NL, and bare commands. Design rule: when ambiguous,
# lean CMD. Misclassifying a command as NL is far worse than the reverse.

# --- command verbs that are also English verbs, used as real commands ---
CMD	make
CMD	make build
CMD	make -j8 all
CMD	find . -name "*.go"
CMD	find / -type f -size +100M
CMD	time go test ./...
CMD	sort -u file.txt
CMD	uniq -c
CMD	touch newfile.txt
CMD	kill -9 1234
CMD	yes | rm -i x
CMD	history | grep ssh
CMD	test -f /etc/hosts
CMD	echo done
CMD	printf "%s\n" hi
CMD	date +%s
CMD	jobs -l
CMD	which python

# --- the same verbs used as natural language (English sentence) ---
NL	make the project build faster
NL	find my ssh config file
NL	find out which process is using port 8080
NL	time how long the build takes
NL	sort these files by modification time
NL	kill the process listening on 3000
NL	touch base with the server and check status
NL	show me the largest files here
NL	list all running docker containers
NL	test whether the api endpoint is reachable
NL	echo the current git branch name

# --- real commands whose ARGS contain English/NL text (must stay CMD) ---
CMD	git commit -m "fix the bug where users cannot log in please"
CMD	echo "show me the files"
CMD	grep "list all the things" notes.txt
CMD	git commit -m "add the feature to list all users"
CMD	curl -d "please process this" https://api.example.com
CMD	printf "how do I do this\n"

# --- bare commands and short aliases (must stay CMD) ---
CMD	ls
CMD	ll
CMD	g st
CMD	k get pods
CMD	vim
CMD	htop
CMD	cd ..
CMD	z proj
CMD	..
CMD	-

# --- piped / structured shell that has no NL strong signals ---
CMD	cat access.log | awk '{print $1}' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
CMD	for f in *.txt; do mv "$f" "${f%.txt}.md"; done
CMD	docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}}'
CMD	ps aux | grep -v grep | grep node
CMD	export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-xxx
CMD	FOO=bar ./run.sh

# --- clear English NL (must be NL) ---
NL	how do I undo the last git commit
NL	what is using all my disk space
NL	delete all node_modules folders under this directory
NL	rename every jpeg to lowercase
NL	please compress this folder into a tarball
NL	can you show me the open network connections
NL	convert all png images in this folder to webp
NL	what processes are listening on tcp ports

# --- Chinese NL (must be NL) ---
NL	把日志按时间排序
NL	帮我看看磁盘还剩多少空间
NL	列出所有正在运行的容器
NL	删除当前目录下所有的临时文件
NL	查找占用 8080 端口的进程
NL	把这个文件夹打包成 tar.gz
NL	显示最近修改过的十个文件
NL	帮我把所有 png 转成 webp

# --- Chinese that embeds a command word but is still NL ---
NL	帮我 grep 一下包含 error 的行
NL	用 git 把改动提交了
NL	能不能 ls 看看这里有什么

# --- tricky: looks like NL but is a valid command invocation ---
CMD	man find
CMD	tldr tar
CMD	brew install ripgrep
CMD	pip install requests
CMD	go get ./...
